message:
test(tx): add concurrency stress tests + wire H7/H10 e2e harnesses

- Add 10 new tests to tx_correctness_suite.rs:
  6 concurrency stress tests (parallel commit/compensation/idempotency/resume/key/mixed),
  2 reason code exhaustion tests (all commit/compensation outcomes),
  2 kill-switch/pause pipeline integration tests
- Wire ft_1i2ge_8_7 (idempotency/dedupe/resume) into scripts/e2e_test.sh
- Wire ft_1i2ge_8_10 (tx correctness/concurrency) into scripts/e2e_test.sh
- Close beads: ft-1i2ge.8.7, ft-1i2ge.8.10

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -504,10 +504,13 @@ SCENARIO_REGISTRY=(
     "ft_1i2ge_3_7|Validate orchestration integration and e2e scenario harness with rich logs|false|cargo,jq,rch|Protects mission lifecycle journal dedup dispatch idempotency and kill-switch integration"
     "ft_1i2ge_8_5|Validate commit-phase executor with deterministic ordering and barrier semantics|false|cargo,jq,rch|Protects barrier semantics kill-switch pause and deterministic commit ordering"
     "ft_1i2ge_8_6|Validate compensation planner and automatic rollback engine|false|cargo,jq,rch|Protects compensation barrier semantics reverse ordering and rollback state contracts"
+    "ft_1i2ge_8_7|Validate durable idempotency, dedupe, and resume invariants|false|cargo,jq,rch|Protects restart-safe idempotency keys dedup guards double-execution blocking and resume reconstruction"
+    "ft_1i2ge_8_10|Validate unit/property/concurrency correctness suite for tx semantics|false|cargo,jq,rch|Protects state machine transitions concurrency determinism reason codes and pipeline integrity"
     "ft_e34d9_10_1_2_doctrine_pack|Validate asupersync runtime doctrine contract/invariants + failure injection|false|jq,python3|Protects doctrine semantics, anti-pattern gates, and user-facing guarantees"
     "ft_e34d9_10_2_1_runtime_bootstrap|Validate unified runtime bootstrap contract for CLI/watch/web/robot + failure injection|false|jq,python3|Protects runtime bootstrap lifecycle parity and configuration parsing contract"
     "ft_e34d9_10_2_2_cx_outcome_contract|Validate Cx/Outcome wait-boundary adapter propagation + failure/recovery contract|false|jq,python3|Protects explicit Cx propagation and reason-coded Outcome boundary mapping"
     "ft_124z4|Validate tailer LabRuntime coverage and bench feature-gate failure/recovery contract|false|cargo,jq,rch|Protects tailer asupersync capture semantics and bench gating invariants"
+    "ft_e34d9_10_4_1_unix_ipc|Validate Unix IPC/socket cutover invariants and deterministic failure/recovery contract|false|cargo,jq,rch,python3|Protects Unix IPC restart/degraded-path invariants and workflow-surface contract"
     "ft_1i2ge_4_2|Validate mission reservation and ownership enforcement contract|false|cargo,jq,rch|Protects assignment reservation/ownership enforcement surface"
     "ft_1i2ge_4_3|Validate mission approval-path integration (durability, idempotency, fallback)|false|cargo,jq,rch|Protects approval-required routing and post-approval continuation invariants"
     "ft_1i2ge_4_1|Validate mission policy preflight contract and denial feedback reason codes|false|cargo,jq,rch|Protects mission policy preflight plan/dispatch pipeline"
@@ -11203,6 +11206,88 @@ run_scenario_ft_1i2ge_8_6() {
     return 0
 }
 
+run_scenario_ft_1i2ge_8_7() {
+    local scenario_dir="$1"
+    local case_name="ft_1i2ge_8_7"
+    local script_path="$PROJECT_ROOT/tests/e2e/test_ft_1i2ge_8_7.sh"
+    local scenario_stdout="$scenario_dir/${case_name}.stdout.log"
+    local before_snapshot="$scenario_dir/${case_name}.logs.before.txt"
+    local after_snapshot="$scenario_dir/${case_name}.logs.after.txt"
+
+    ls -1 "$PROJECT_ROOT/tests/e2e/logs"/ft_1i2ge_8_7_* 2>/dev/null | LC_ALL=C sort >"$before_snapshot" || true
+
+    log_info "[$case_name] Step 1: running durable idempotency/dedupe/resume e2e harness"
+    set +e
+    timeout "$TIMEOUT" bash "$script_path" >"$scenario_stdout" 2>&1
+    local rc=$?
+    set -e
+
+    if [[ "$rc" -eq 124 ]]; then
+        log_fail "[$case_name] harness timed out after ${TIMEOUT}s"
+        tail -n 120 "$scenario_stdout" >&2 || true
+        return 4
+    fi
+    if [[ "$rc" -ne 0 ]]; then
+        log_fail "[$case_name] harness failed (exit=$rc)"
+        tail -n 120 "$scenario_stdout" >&2 || true
+        return "$rc"
+    fi
+
+    ls -1 "$PROJECT_ROOT/tests/e2e/logs"/ft_1i2ge_8_7_* 2>/dev/null | LC_ALL=C sort >"$after_snapshot" || true
+    while IFS= read -r log_path; do
+        if [[ -z "$log_path" ]]; then
+            continue
+        fi
+        if [[ ! -f "$before_snapshot" ]] || ! grep -Fxq "$log_path" "$before_snapshot"; then
+            cp -f "$log_path" "$scenario_dir/" || true
+        fi
+    done < "$after_snapshot"
+
+    log_pass "[$case_name] durable idempotency/dedupe/resume e2e completed"
+    return 0
+}
+
+run_scenario_ft_1i2ge_8_10() {
+    local scenario_dir="$1"
+    local case_name="ft_1i2ge_8_10"
+    local script_path="$PROJECT_ROOT/tests/e2e/test_ft_1i2ge_8_10.sh"
+    local scenario_stdout="$scenario_dir/${case_name}.stdout.log"
+    local before_snapshot="$scenario_dir/${case_name}.logs.before.txt"
+    local after_snapshot="$scenario_dir/${case_name}.logs.after.txt"
+
+    ls -1 "$PROJECT_ROOT/tests/e2e/logs"/ft_1i2ge_8_10_* 2>/dev/null | LC_ALL=C sort >"$before_snapshot" || true
+
+    log_info "[$case_name] Step 1: running tx correctness/concurrency e2e harness"
+    set +e
+    timeout "$TIMEOUT" bash "$script_path" >"$scenario_stdout" 2>&1
+    local rc=$?
+    set -e
+
+    if [[ "$rc" -eq 124 ]]; then
+        log_fail "[$case_name] harness timed out after ${TIMEOUT}s"
+        tail -n 120 "$scenario_stdout" >&2 || true
+        return 4
+    fi
+    if [[ "$rc" -ne 0 ]]; then
+        log_fail "[$case_name] harness failed (exit=$rc)"
+        tail -n 120 "$scenario_stdout" >&2 || true
+        return "$rc"
+    fi
+
+    ls -1 "$PROJECT_ROOT/tests/e2e/logs"/ft_1i2ge_8_10_* 2>/dev/null | LC_ALL=C sort >"$after_snapshot" || true
+    while IFS= read -r log_path; do
+        if [[ -z "$log_path" ]]; then
+            continue
+        fi
+        if [[ ! -f "$before_snapshot" ]] || ! grep -Fxq "$log_path" "$before_snapshot"; then
+            cp -f "$log_path" "$scenario_dir/" || true
+        fi
+    done < "$after_snapshot"
+
+    log_pass "[$case_name] tx correctness/concurrency e2e completed"
+    return 0
+}
+
 run_scenario_ft_e34d9_10_1_2_doctrine_pack() {
     local scenario_dir="$1"
     local case_name="ft_e34d9_10_1_2_doctrine_pack"
@@ -11572,6 +11657,47 @@ run_scenario_ft_124z4() {
     return 0
 }
 
+run_scenario_ft_e34d9_10_4_1_unix_ipc() {
+    local scenario_dir="$1"
+    local case_name="ft_e34d9_10_4_1_unix_ipc"
+    local script_path="$PROJECT_ROOT/tests/e2e/test_ft_e34d9_10_4_1_unix_ipc.sh"
+    local scenario_stdout="$scenario_dir/${case_name}.stdout.log"
+    local before_snapshot="$scenario_dir/${case_name}.logs.before.txt"
+    local after_snapshot="$scenario_dir/${case_name}.logs.after.txt"
+
+    ls -1 "$PROJECT_ROOT/tests/e2e/logs"/ft_e34d9_10_4_1_unix_ipc_* 2>/dev/null | LC_ALL=C sort >"$before_snapshot" || true
+
+    log_info "[$case_name] Step 1: running unix ipc invariants e2e harness"
+    set +e
+    timeout "$TIMEOUT" bash "$script_path" >"$scenario_stdout" 2>&1
+    local rc=$?
+    set -e
+
+    if [[ "$rc" -eq 124 ]]; then
+        log_fail "[$case_name] harness timed out after ${TIMEOUT}s"
+        tail -n 120 "$scenario_stdout" >&2 || true
+        return 4
+    fi
+    if [[ "$rc" -ne 0 ]]; then
+        log_fail "[$case_name] harness failed (exit=$rc)"
+        tail -n 120 "$scenario_stdout" >&2 || true
+        return "$rc"
+    fi
+
+    ls -1 "$PROJECT_ROOT/tests/e2e/logs"/ft_e34d9_10_4_1_unix_ipc_* 2>/dev/null | LC_ALL=C sort >"$after_snapshot" || true
+    while IFS= read -r log_path; do
+        if [[ -z "$log_path" ]]; then
+            continue
+        fi
+        if [[ ! -f "$before_snapshot" ]] || ! grep -Fxq "$log_path" "$before_snapshot"; then
+            cp -f "$log_path" "$scenario_dir/" || true
+        fi
+    done < "$after_snapshot"
+
+    log_pass "[$case_name] unix ipc invariants e2e completed"
+    return 0
+}
+
 dispatch_scenario() {
     local name="$1"
     local scenario_dir="$2"
@@ -11718,6 +11844,12 @@ dispatch_scenario() {
         ft_1i2ge_8_6)
             run_scenario_ft_1i2ge_8_6 "$scenario_dir" || result=$?
             ;;
+        ft_1i2ge_8_7)
+            run_scenario_ft_1i2ge_8_7 "$scenario_dir" || result=$?
+            ;;
+        ft_1i2ge_8_10)
+            run_scenario_ft_1i2ge_8_10 "$scenario_dir" || result=$?
+            ;;
         ft_e34d9_10_1_2_doctrine_pack)
             run_scenario_ft_e34d9_10_1_2_doctrine_pack "$scenario_dir" || result=$?
             ;;
@@ -11745,6 +11877,9 @@ dispatch_scenario() {
         ft_124z4)
             run_scenario_ft_124z4 "$scenario_dir" || result=$?
             ;;
+        ft_e34d9_10_4_1_unix_ipc)
+            run_scenario_ft_e34d9_10_4_1_unix_ipc "$scenario_dir" || result=$?
+            ;;
         replay_capture_pipeline)
             run_scenario_replay_capture_pipeline "$scenario_dir" || result=$?
             ;;
